summary: Completed testing of Booking Engine Integration with ConfigService. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified - room types, rate plans, pricing from Configuration displayed correctly with 'DEPUIS CONFIG' and 'VIA CONFIG' badges. Fixed a bug in nights calculation for reservations.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/booking-engine/config - Returns 200
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/booking-engine/config - Contains room types (STD, SUP, DLX, STE)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/booking-engine/config - Contains rate plans (BAR, NRF)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/booking-engine/config - Contains pricing matrix
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/booking-engine/config - Source is 'config_service'
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/booking-engine/availability - Returns 200
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/booking-engine/availability - Contains room types with pricing
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/booking-engine/availability - Calculates nights correctly
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/booking-engine/availability - Contains hotel info
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/booking-engine/availability - Contains rate plans
Backend: POST /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/reservations - Auto-calculates price from ConfigService (120€/night for STD BAR)
Backend: POST /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/reservations - Uses provided price when explicitly given
Backend: POST /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/reservations - NRF rate plan applies -10% discount (108€)
Backend: booking-engine/config accessible without auth (public endpoint)
Backend: booking-engine/availability accessible without auth (public endpoint)
Frontend: Booking tab displays room types from Configuration with 'DEPUIS CONFIG' badge
Frontend: Booking tab shows all 4 room types: STD (120€), SUP (160€), DLX (220€), STE (350€)
Frontend: Booking tab shows BAR FLEX and NON REMBOURSABLE rates
Frontend: Booking tab shows hotel info from config (Grand Hôtel Paris, EUR, Check-in 15:00, Check-out 11:00)
Frontend: Meta Search tab displays direct price with 'VIA CONFIG' badge
Frontend: Meta Search tab shows €120 direct price from configuration
Frontend: Meta Search tab shows OTA comparison prices dynamically calculated
Frontend: Dashboard shows Direct price 120€ in price comparator

bugs_fixed.issue: Nights calculation was using datetime difference instead of date difference
bugs_fixed.impact: Reservations with check-in at 14:00 and check-out at 11:00 were calculating 1 night instead of 2 nights

critical_code_review_comments: Booking Engine endpoints correctly integrate with ConfigService for real-time pricing
Public endpoints (booking-engine/config and booking-engine/availability) work without authentication - good for booking widget
Reservation auto-pricing from ConfigService works correctly when room_rate/total_amount not provided
Frontend correctly displays 'DEPUIS CONFIG' and 'VIA CONFIG' badges to indicate data source
OTA comparison prices are dynamically calculated from the base config price
seed_data_creation: Using existing test data from Configuration module
context_for_next_testing_agent: Booking Engine Integration with ConfigService fully tested. New endpoints: GET /api/hotels/{id}/booking-engine/config (returns room_types, rate_plans, pricing_matrix from ConfigService), GET /api/hotels/{id}/booking-engine/availability (returns available rooms with pricing for date range). POST /api/hotels/{id}/reservations now auto-calculates prices from ConfigService when room_rate/total_amount not provided. Frontend Booking tab shows room types with 'DEPUIS CONFIG' badge, Meta Search tab shows direct price with 'VIA CONFIG' badge. Fixed bug: nights calculation now uses date difference instead of datetime difference.

booking_engine_config_endpoint.returns: hotel, room_types, rate_plans, pricing_matrix, policies, settings, currency

booking_engine_availability_endpoint.returns: hotel info, room_types with pricing per rate plan, rate_plans, policies

reservation_auto_pricing.behavior: Auto-calculates room_rate and total_amount from ConfigService pricing_matrix when not provided
reservation_auto_pricing.uses: room_type_code and rate_plan_code to lookup price

frontend_booking_tab.displays: Room types from Configuration with 'DEPUIS CONFIG' badge
frontend_booking_tab.shows: CODE, NOM, CAPACITE, PRIX BASE, BAR FLEX, NON REMBOURSABLE, CHAMBRES
frontend_booking_tab.hotel_info: Etablissement, Devise, Check-in, Check-out from Configuration

frontend_meta_search_tab.ota_comparison: Booking.com, Expedia, Trivago, Google Hotels, Airbnb with dynamic pricing
